stonetop.summary: A proud storm-spirit bound to a cloak that bears its wearer aloft — when it deigns to listen.

system.concept: A proud storm-spirit bound to a cloak that bears its wearer aloft — when it deigns to listen.
system.description: Bound to a cloak, this proud, mute storm-spirit springs to life on the word of command and obeys its wearer as a follower — though it never wants to land, and would rather 'not hear' your commands. While it serves, it bears its master aloft on swirling winds and brings a storm with it wherever it flies. Its cost is hours spent flying about.
